---
title: "Function spaces"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---

\newcommand{\C}{\mathbb{C}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\Z}{\mathbb{Z}}
\newcommand{\N}{\mathbb{N}}
\newcommand{\<}{\left<}
\newcommand{\>}{\right>}
\newcommand{\ra}{\rightarrow}

  - $U\subset\R^n$

  - $C(U)\equiv$ continuous function

  - $C_c(U)\equiv$ continuous functions with compact support

  - $C_0(U)\equiv$ continuous functions that vanish at infinity

  - $B(U)\equiv$ bounded function, $|f|\leq M$

  - $C^\infty(U)\equiv$ smooth functions

  - $C_c^\infty(U)\equiv$ smooth functions with compact support

  - $C^{k,\alpha}\equiv\{f : |f(x)-f(y)|\leq C\|x-y\|^\alpha\}$
  
    - $|f|_{C^{0,\alpha}}\equiv\sup_{x\neq y\in\Omega}\frac{|f(x)-f(y)|}{\|x-y\|^\alpha}$

  - $\mathscr{S}(U)\equiv$ smooth functions of rapid decrease
  
    - Schwartz space
  
    - $\|f\|_{\alpha,\beta}=\sup_{x\in U}|x^\alpha D^\beta f(x)|$
  
    - $\mathscr{S}=\{C^\infty:\|f\|_{\alpha,\beta}<\infty, \ \forall \ \alpha,\beta\in\N^n\}$
  
    - $\mathscr{S}^*=$ tempered distributions

  - $L^p(U)\equiv\{f \ | \ \int_U|f|^pd\mu<\infty\}$
  
    - $(L^p)^*=L^{1-\frac{1}{p}}, \ 1\leq p\leq\infty$

    - $(L^2)^*=L^2$

  - $W^{k,p}(U)\equiv$ $L^p$ function with $k$th order weak derivatives
  
    - Sobolov space
    
    - $\|f\|_{W^{k,p}}=\left(\sum_{|\alpha|\leq k}\|D^\alpha f\|_p^p\right)^{1/p}, \ 1\leq p<\infty$
    
    - $\|f\|_{W^{k,p}}=\max_{|\alpha|\leq k}\|D^\alpha f\|_\infty, \ \ p=\infty$
    
  - $L^p_{\text{loc}}(U)=\{f:f\in L^p(K) \ \forall K\subset_c U\}$
  
    - $\{f:\int_U|f\phi|d\mu<\infty \ \forall \ \phi\in C_c^\infty\}$
    
  - càdlàg, RCLL, Skorohod space
